mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resource ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM resource WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource (chapter_id, title, type, url, description, difficulty, view_count) VALUES (#{chapterId}, #{title}, #{type}, #{url}, #{description}, #{difficulty}, #{viewCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE resource SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
